articles.title: Mets at Phillies — Game Analysis
articles.author: Mark
articles.body:
Quintana has been up and down and that Mets bullpen though has gotten better now around 19th still blowing us a game recently though it’s a lot less frequent. Mets have been 21-33 in last 64 against the cubs. Versus LHP Mets .242 over last 10 .252 over season. Cubs at .229 over last 10 .233 for the season so definitely a hitting edge for the Mets. Scoring 3, 7, 14, 11, and 5 runs in their last 5 games. Good for a team struggling at the mound numbers trending up for sure. 12th in the majors runs scored batting .246 as a team. Slugging is way off the charts better recently. Cubs playing a little better themselves 6-5 game 3 against the Giants a 5-2 in game 2 and losing 6-7 in game one. So keeping it competitive. With Imanaga 7-1 today a great showing against the Cardinals 4 hits 1 run in 7 innings so he’s picked it up from his slum this guy is a stud. They scored just fine against the Giants (injured bullpen) though not against the Cardinals. Not a lot of hitters 17th in runs scored in the majors 22nd in slugging. They are batting .233 as a team over all. Mets ok on the road 16-15 cubs 21-16 at home much better at home. Pretty good no run first inning game. There’s just no value with the cubs with Imonaga on the mound. So I wouldn’t blame you to Mets. Give me the cubs fading Mets.

Use blank lines between paragraphs.
